validation_output.summary: RED as expected: 63 passed, 4 failed. All failures are new POST /api/providers/export-with-secrets tests receiving 405 from the missing route instead of expected confirmation rejection or confirmed credential-bearing export behavior.

must_preserve_evidence.G-SECRET-EXPORT: Added tests requiring /api/providers/export-with-secrets to reject missing and false confirmation with SECRET_EXPORT_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED, and to return containsSecrets:true only after acknowledgedCredentialExposure:true.
must_preserve_evidence.G-SEC-REDIRECT: Confirmed-export test expects selected provider credential only at providers[0].credential={status:'present', apiKey}; it rejects top-level provider apiKey leakage, unselected provider secrets, official/local auth tokens, and env key names.
must_preserve_evidence.G-TEST: Ran the required focused suite and verified RED failure is behavioral: missing route returns 405. No syntax/setup failure occurred.
must_preserve_evidence.G-SCOPE: Modified only src/server/__tests__/providers.test.ts; no production, desktop, .env, credential, or user config files were changed.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-003: Tests preserve both paths by leaving existing secret-free export coverage intact and adding separate credential-bearing endpoint coverage.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-004: Existing default export redaction tests remain unchanged; new secret tests do not make default export credential-bearing.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-005: Confirmed export must be high-friction and labeled: tests require explicit confirmation and credential-bearing labeling metadata containing credential-bearing.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-010: Tests enforce server-owned export behavior by asserting serialized server response excludes unselected credentials and local auth state.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-001: Export remains read-only in the covered path; selected provider bundle assertions are response-only.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-006: Credential inclusion is asserted through server bundle construction, independent of provider list masking behavior.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-007: RED tests directly cover confirmation, containsSecrets:true, credential-bearing labeling, and no remembered/local auth state transfer.

concerns: Project cognition command was attempted and blocked: status.json exists but project-cognition.db is missing. I proceeded from the allowed live references and feature artifacts.

Workspace already had concurrent modifications in src/server/__tests__/providers.test.ts plus production/type files before this task. I preserved them and only appended T012 tests inside the assigned file.

The labeling assertion is intentionally contract-level: it accepts credential-bearing labeling in app, metadata, labels, or security metadata, but requires the serialized metadata to contain credential-bearing.
recovery_hints: Implement T013 by adding POST /api/providers/export-with-secrets route parsing ProviderSecretExportConfirmationRequestSchema or equivalent confirmation logic.
Return a stable SECRET_EXPORT_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED error for missing or false confirmation.

Confirmed export should map selected providers to credential.status='present' with apiKey only inside the credential-bearing bundle provider credential object, set containsSecrets:true, add credential-bearing metadata, and keep active/default/OAuth/login state out of the bundle.
